name: Venomancer
description: No necromancer shall raise what the venomancer puts down.

abilities.name: Venomous Gale
abilities.description: Launches a ball of venom in a line. The venom-spit deals an initial damage, then applies a damage over time poison with movement speed slow to all affected enemy units.

abilities.name: Poison Sting
abilities.description: Imbues Venomancer's attack with poison damage and applies a movement speed slow. Plague Ward's attacks apply all ability effects, albeit with reduced damage.

abilities.name: Plague Ward
abilities.description: Creates a living embodiment of plague that deals physical damage and is not affected by damage block sources.

abilities.name: Noxious Plague
abilities.description: Infects an enemy unit with a deadly plague that applies impact damage and additional damage over time based on the unit's max health. When the affected enemy unit dies or the debuff expires, all other enemy units within the radius are infected with a non-contagious plague.
